productDisplayName: Puma Women Avenue Shopper Purple Bag
description: Discover your funky yet feminine side with the puma Avenue Shopper bag. The colour adds glamour to your look, while the handles provide carrying ease. Stuff all your accessories into this spacious bag and kickstart your day with ample style. Length: 34 cm Made of polyester for durability and easy maintenance 3015 twill polyester lining Two-way zip opening into the main compartment Zip pocket inside with a slip-in pocket and mobile phone pocket inside Roped PU carry handles with shiny black metal hardware PU tape zip pullers Metal plate on front with embossed puma wording Puma quilting all over Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
